stories.title: Lakers' Reaves intends to sign a $185M extension
stories.summary: Lakers star Austin Reaves intends to sign a four-year, $185 million maximum contract to return to the franchise, with a player option for the final season in 2029-30, sources tell ESPN's Shams Charania.

stories.title: Celtics' Stevens: Brown remains 'big part of us'
stories.summary: Amid reported trade talks for Jaylen Brown, Celtics president of basketball operations Brad Stevens said Tuesday night that the star forward remains "valued" by the organization.

stories.title: Sparks' Plum out 4 weeks with left leg injury
stories.summary: The Los Angeles Sparks announced that Kelsey Plum will be out for at least four weeks with a lower left leg injury.
